data.title: Stock of Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE) drops by 25% after earnings report. Investors urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi with losses over $50,000.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced losses exceeding $50,000 in Helen of Troy to reach out to him directly. If you have incurred losses of over $50,000 in Helen of Troy stock or options, it is advisable to contact James Wilson to explore potential options regarding your situation.

data.title: BrandJet AI introduces Artemis MCP to assist GTM teams with workflows. Launch event on Feb 20, 2026 in San Francisco.
data.description: In San Francisco on February 20, 2026, BrandJet AI introduced Artemis, a cutting-edge Model Context Protocol (MCP) layer. This innovative platform aims to assist go-to-market (GTM) teams in implementing intricate multi-step workflows seamlessly through natural language processing technology.

data.title: Kohler wins Best of Show Booth Design at KBIS for fourth year; recognized for innovation and sustainability.
data.description: A respected pioneer in design and innovation has earned accolades for groundbreaking product displays, innovative wellness offerings, and cutting-edge sustainability progress. Kohler, based in Kohler, Wisconsin, proudly announces that it has secured the prestigious Best of Show title at the 2026 Kitchen & Bath Expo. This achievement signifies Kohler's leadership in the industry, showcasing revolutionary solutions that push boundaries and prioritize sustainability.

data.title: Kinko Optical Co., Ltd. selects Beneq C2R™ to scale AR waveguides for XR glasses, to meet high-volume production demand.
data.description: In Taiwan, Kinko Optical Co., LTD., an Asian ODM, has recently integrated Beneq's C2R™ plasma-enhanced spatial ALD system to advance its manufacturing capabilities. By adopting this system, Kinko is gearing up for large-scale production of high-index, low-loss optical coatings on diffractive waveguides for its partners. This development is crucial as the eXtended Reality (XR) sector is experiencing significant growth, particularly driven by the increasing desire for immersive AR experiences in consumer electronics like XR glasses. This move comes at a time when the industry is witnessing notable advancements in this area.

data.title: Partnership VIPC launches National Innovation Quarter in Virginia to boost innovation, entrepreneurship, and competitiveness.
data.description: A new initiative called the National Innovation Quarter (National IQ) has been launched in Arlington, Virginia on February 20, 2026. The aim of National IQ is to foster innovation, entrepreneurship, and enhance national competitiveness by linking individuals, locations, and programs. The Virginia Innovation Partnership Corp. (VIPC) spearheaded this celebration, marking the beginning of an effort to drive progress in these areas. This development signifies a step towards accelerating innovation and boosting competitiveness at a national level.
